ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2026 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Fahmi Alhayani and Wafa Ali, self-represented plaintiffs, appeared. The court vacates the sanction previously imposed on each Plaintiff on Nov-25-2025. At the request of Plaintiffs, the court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
